title: The plan send to TiFlash is wrong when non prepared plan cache is enable
description: ## Bug Report Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks! ### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required) ```sql create table test.a (id int, value varchar(64)); insert into test.a values(1,'a'),(2,'b'),(3,'c'),(null,'d'); create table test.b (id int, value varchar(64)); alter table test.a set tiflash replica 1; alter table test.b set tiflash replica 1; use test; set @@tidb_isolation_read_engines='tiflash'; set @@tidb_opt_broadcast_cartesian_join=2; select * from a as t1 join a as t2 on 1 = 1; ``` ### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required) the qps of selection is always 0. ### 3. What did you see instead (Required) The qps of selection is not 0. ### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required) ``` +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ | tidb_version() | +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ | Release Version: v7.2.0-alpha Edition: Community Git Commit Hash: b51758efdbd970ece2a511ab29767a0a6bdc6a83 Git Branch: heads/refs/tags/v7.2.0-alpha UTC Build Time: 2023-05-06 14:33:10 GoVersion: go1.20.3 Race Enabled: false TiKV Min Version: 6.2.0-alpha Check Table Before Drop: false Store: tikv | +----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ ```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE c (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE d (id INTEGER, value TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES c(id));
SELECT * FROM c AS t1 JOIN d AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Non prepared plan cache with TiFlash replica enabled
